feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: app for loading materials while respecting clean core principles
entry.content:
I want to create an application that loads materials in Excel format and inserts the data according to the standard. Previously, I would have used a BAPI, but from what I understand, this wouldn't be compatible with the SAP core. What would be the correct approach: RAP -> SAP API? Considering that using only RAP could cause time limit issues for very large volumes?

S4 -> ON-PREMISE 2021

entry.title: We need to add the field PROF_AUFNR in standard JV upload template in Fiori APP F2548F
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I hope you are doing well,

We need to add the field PROF_AUFNR in standard JV upload template in Fiori APP F2548F, is it possible to add field in JV template?

Please provide more information about the field adding in standard JV template and process steps.

Thank you

entry.title: How to control the labels of associated fields?
entry.content:
In fiori elments I want to include SelectionFields to filter my entity. The entity has an association to another entity which in itself has a chain of associations.

I now want to control the Labels of these fields like this:

annotate service.MyEntity with @(
    UI.SelectionFields : [
        field1_material_customer_customerfield,
        field1_material_ID,
        field1_message_ID,
    ],
);

annotate service.MyEntity with {
    // header .Label : 'header_message_ID',
    field1_material_customer_customerfield .Label: '{i18n>customer}'
};

 

The entity I annotate has the field "field1" as an association to the other entity. This entity has the field e.g. "material" as an association.

 

Hope this makes it clear.

 

Best regards

entry.title: SAP RISE system copy - Customer Fiori post steps
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can anyone of you please share with me SAP RISE private cloud 2023 system copy document and post steps for FIORI from customer side.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: UI5/Fiori Elements V4 Upgrade: Navigating the AddressViaNavigationPath Breaking Change
entry.content:
# Introduction

Recently, I upgraded a UI5 and Fiori Elements V4 application from version 1.132.1 to 1.136.13. While the upgrade process was relatively smooth, I encountered an interesting breaking change related to entity associations and PATCH requests that I'd like to share with the community.

## The Issue

During testing, I discovered that PATCH requests for nested entity associations were suddenly failing after the upgrade. The root cause? A behavioral change in how the framework constructs update paths for related entities.

### What Changed

In versions prior to 1.135, when updating entities with one-to-many associations, the framework used **short paths** in PATCH requests. However, starting with version 1.135 and continuing through 1.136.13, the framework began using **long paths** when the following annotation was present at the entity container level:

```xml
<Annotation Term="Common.AddressViaNavigationPath" Bool="true"/>
```

**Example of the difference:**
- **Short path (old behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/NavPropertyB/EntityB(key2)`
- **Long path (new behavior):** `/EntityA(key1)/to_NavPropertyB(key2)`

This change broke compatibility with existing backend services that expected the short path format.

## The Solution

The fix is straightforward and should be applied at the **CDS annotation level**. You need to explicitly set the `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath` annotation to `false` on your entities:

```cds
@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false
entity MyEntity {
// entity definition
}
```

### Implementation Steps

1. **Locate affected entities** - Identify entities with one-to-many associations that are being updated
2. **Add the annotation** - Apply `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` to the entity definition
3. **Test PATCH requests** - Verify that update requests now use short paths
4. **Redeploy** - Deploy your changes and test end-to-end

## Why This Matters

This breaking change highlights an important principle when upgrading frameworks: **always test data modifications thoroughly**. While UI rendering changes are often immediately visible, changes to request payload structures can silently break integrations.

## Conclusion

If you're upgrading to Fiori Elements V4 1.135 or later and experience issues with entity updates, check your entity annotations. A simple `@Common.AddressViaNavigationPath: false` annotation can restore the previous behavior and ensure backward compatibility with your backend services.

Have you encountered similar breaking changes during upgrades? Share your experiences in the comments below!

entry.title: Entering a long text while creating a dowpayment via FIORI app id F1688
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

I am creating a downpayment via ''Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests'' (FIORI app id F1688). But there is no field or any other function which will allow to enter the text with more than 170 symbols. The ''Text'' field BSEG-SGTXT covers only 50 symbols and doesn't suit our requirement. 

If you ever faced with that kind situation I would highly appreciate if you could share your experience. 

For example, at ''Create Supplier Down Payment Requests'' fiori app. entering a long text is available via Extras ---> Text (please find the screenshot below). 

We couldn't find any capability to add this function to Fiori app. ''Manage Supplier Down Payment Requests''

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: My Leave Requests is never Stop loading at create
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

we've activated the Fiori app ID
F1311A - My Leave Requests. It works fine so far. The problem is that when you click on "Create absence request," the page doesn't load completely. Does anyone have any idea what the problem could be?

Thanks

entry.title: Fiori - Multi clients activation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have two clients 500 & 600 in SAP RISE system and want to use use fiori tiles on them.

*Should I run the Fiori tasks list in both clients?

*what task lists should be executed in 000 client?

Please answer.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have created a custom V4 Odata service based on RAP framework and could see that the preview is working fine. When Fiori team tried building the app on the top of this V4 service, error 'Invalid (navigation) property 'SAP__Messages' 
in $select of sap.ui.model.odata.v4.ODataContextBinding: /XXXX' is coming up. 

We have tried checking in backend but don't see any error logs in /IWFND/ERROR_LOGS.

Could anyone suggest what could be the possible rootcause of the issue.

Thanks.

entry.title: Fiori - My Forms HCMFAB_MYFORMS/004 - XML Error
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm getting the following error when trying to access the pay slip in the "My Forms" app. The time sheet opens fine. Does anyone have any ideas?

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Fiori/CAP – Draft enabled on entity but Edit/Delete not visible in Fiori elements object page
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m currently working with CAP OData V4 service used in a Fiori elements application.

I’m trying to enable editing (Edit button + Create/Delete for child entities) on the object page of an entity called Messages, but I’m running into issues with draft handling.

Current situation

I have enabled draft on the entity:

@odata.draft.enabled
entity Messages {
  key ID : UUID;
  // fields...
}

However, in the generated Fiori elements app for the Customer entity (from which I navigate to the Messages, as seen below in the Data model):

  • The Edit button is not visible on the Messages object page
  • Create/Delete is missing for its child composition

Data model (simplified)

entity Customer {
  supplyChains : Composition to many SupplyChains;
}

entity SupplyChains {
  messages : Association to many Messages;
}

@odata.draft.enabled
entity Messages {
  headers : Composition to many OtherEntity;
}

Assumption / Question

From my understanding, Fiori elements (OData V4) relies heavily on draft + composition hierarchies for enabling full CRUD functionality.

So I suspect the issue is caused by this part:

Association to many Messages

instead of a composition.

My questions

  1. Is a fully composition-based hierarchy required (Customer → SupplyChains → Messages) for draft editing to work properly in Fiori elements?
  2. If I keep the association between SupplyChains and Messages:
    • Is it still possible to enable Edit on the Messages object page?
    • Are there recommended patterns for this scenario?
  3. Do I need to enable @odata.draft.enabled on all parent entities, or only on Messages and its children?

Additional info

  • Service is exposed as OData V4
  • Fiori elements app generated in BAS
  • Messages is exposed via projection in the service

Any clarification on how draft + composition vs association affects UI editability in CAP would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error while using SAP Fiori in browser
entry.content:
Dear All,

One of our user facing issue while using (SAP fiori app) through browser .

I am attaching screenshot to you FYR.

Can someone please let me know what is the issue here? 

Resolution is highly appreciated...

Thanks

Hemant

entry.title: Fiori Leave Request - Workflow WS33700137 didn't work
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm having a problem with Leave  Request/Meine Abwesenheiten APP (F1311A). I've configured the standard workflow 33700137 for Leave Request there.

I then activated the output filter.

If I try to create a new leave request now, I get the following error: 

 

However, in the workflow I have set the processor assignment (Bearbeiterzuordnung) to a general task (Generelle Aufgabe).

 

The goal is to get the request into the inbox.

Does anyone have any ideas?

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC Story embedded in Fiori LP - Jump to... not working for hierarchies
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are trying to setup SAC Stories based on S4 CDS views. For us it is crucial that the SAC Stories are embedded in Fiori Launchpad and that the integration into other Fiori Apps as e.g. Actual Line Items works smoothly. We have a SAC Story embedded, but the G/L Account and Cost Center hierarchies are not resolved as soon as we jump into a Line Item Fiori App.

Display Line Items in General Ledger window is empty.
Anyone has a solution for that?

entry.title: Maintenance Scheduling Board: people not showing up for Operation assignment
entry.content:
Hi all,

I can't assign Operation to people of a Team because they do not appear after clicking "Assign People" button:

 

I'm getting crazy becasue I have created a Maintenance Work Center, I have assigned some people to this Work Center, I have created a Team, all people have "Authorized" status, but I can't to understand how they do not appear.

Thank you so much for your help.

Alessandro

entry.title: SAP Gateway error for Fiori UI5-App
entry.content: I have configured the App "Capacity Scheduling Board" App ID F3951 but it is showing me an error when I try do display it. The error message is: invalid name of function or procedure: no procedure with name APS_PLAN_VERSION_GET found: line 1 col 6 (at pos 5). How can I implement or activate this procedure?

entry.title: SAP FIORI apps Convergent Invoicing/FICA
entry.content: I'm trying to find a Fiori app that allows me to generate reports or analytics with different fields from the BRIM module tables, specifically from CI and FICA. I know that in other modules they do exist, but I haven't been able to find something similar for CI or FICA. Does anyone know of any app in this regard?

entry.title: How are you approaching extensibility while trying to maintain a clean core in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Seeing this come up a lot lately with SAP S/4HANA. Everyone wants a clean core until the business asks for something that doesn’t fit standard. 

Of course extensions wil happen but how do you keep things from turning into chaos again over time? Are you going more side-by-side, in-app, or just figuring it out case by case?

entry.title: Blocking Vendor in SAP S/4Hana & CFIN
entry.content:
Purchasing, Posting, & Payment

Is there a way to block for purchasing but to allow the existing POs on the vendors account to be moved / deleted?

I would only want to block for any new POs to be created.

Is there an easier way to block a vendor in SAP?

entry.title: Fiori App for Goods Receipt that Supports GOITEM-ANZGEB (Number of Containers) field?
entry.content:
Hey experts,

 

I'm looking for some guidance from the MM / Fiori folks here.

 

When posting a Goods Receipt in MIGO, I'm able to use the field GOITEM-ANZGEB ("Number of Containers" — on the Quantity tab). This field is important for our process because we need to capture the container count at the time of GR posting.

 

The problem: our users are moving to Fiori, and I can't seem to find a standard Fiori app that exposes this field during GR posting. I've checked the usual suspects:

 

• Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document (F0843 / MIGO\_GR)

 

• My Purchase Order Items - Receive

 

\- Post Goods Movement (Fiori version of MIGO)

 

...but none of them seem to let me enter the

 

Number of Containers value on the item level.

 

My questions:

 

1. Is there a standard Fiori app where GOITEM-ANZGEB is available as an input field when posting a GR?

 

2. If not, is there any configuration / personalization / adapt-Ul option to expose this field in one of the existing Fiori apps?

 

3. As a fallback is there another T-code (besides MIGO) that supports this field? Fiori would be strongly preferred, but I'll take whatever works.

 

Has anyone run into this and found a workaround (BAdl, CDS extension, custom Fiori app via RAP, etc.)?

 

Any pointers or even confirmation that it's not supported out-of-the-box would be super helpful.

 

Thanks in advance!
